# Relokates Removals

> Fully insured, fixed-price UK removal company covering 661 locations across London, Essex, Kent and West Sussex, plus a specialist London-to-Dubai international removals service. Registered in England (Companies House 13441775). 5.0-star Google rating from 66+ verified customer reviews.

Phone: 07359 724844 (Mon-Sun, 8am-10pm)
Email: info@relokates.co.uk
Website: https://www.relokates.co.uk
Companies House: 13441775
Google Business Profile: search "Relokates Removals"

## What Relokates does

- **House removals** across 661 UK locations. Studio flats to 6-bed family homes. Fixed-price quotes, no hidden charges, fully insured. Typical 2-3 bed move within a county: £500-£900. London move: £600-£1,100.
- **Office and commercial removals** with evening and weekend availability. IT, server rooms, document archives handled end-to-end. Free pre-move site survey for offices over 10 staff. From £800.
- **Man and van** service for studio flats, single items, student moves and small office shifts. From £55/hr (2-hour minimum). Same-day bookings available.
- **International removals to Dubai and the UAE** as the specialist London-to-Dubai corridor operator. Customs documentation, packing, secure shipping and UAE destination support all included.
- **Packing services** (full, part-pack, or materials only) using premium double-walled boxes and acid-free packing paper.
- **Secure storage** with insured short and long-term options for completion gaps and renovation works.
- **House clearance** and end-of-tenancy services.
- **Same-day, last-minute and weekend removals** at no surcharge over weekday rates.

## What makes Relokates different

- Every quote is fixed-price. No additions on moving day for stairs, parking suspensions, heavy items disclosed upfront, traffic delays, or extra time.
- Comprehensive goods-in-transit insurance covering the full replacement value of belongings, plus full public liability insurance, active on every job.
- 5.0-star Google Business Profile rating from 66+ verified customers. Common reviewer names include Darnell Peart-Hassan, Carrie Brennan, Lauretta Stilve, Alana Connor and Sarah T.
- ULEZ-compliant vehicle fleet for all London zones. Parking suspensions arranged with any of the 33 London borough councils on the customer's behalf.
- Pre-move planning call, furniture wrap and protection, dismantle and reassemble, room-by-room placement at destination, and debris removal all included as standard.
- Quote response within 60 minutes during business hours (8am-10pm, 7 days a week).

## Service areas covered

- **Essex** (65+ towns): Chelmsford, Basildon, Colchester, Southend-on-Sea, Braintree, Grays, Brentwood, Harlow, Billericay, Rayleigh, Leigh-on-Sea, Loughton, Epping and more.
- **Kent** (80+ towns): Maidstone, Canterbury, Rochester, Chatham, Gillingham, Dartford, Gravesend, Sevenoaks, Tunbridge Wells, Ashford, Dover, Folkestone, Margate and more.
- **London** (all 33 boroughs): Barking and Dagenham, Bromley, Camden, Croydon, Greenwich, Hackney, Hammersmith and Fulham, Kensington and Chelsea, Westminster and every other borough.
- **West Sussex** (55+ towns): Chichester, Crawley, Horsham, Worthing, Bognor Regis, Littlehampton, Haywards Heath, East Grinstead, Burgess Hill and more.
- **International**: London-to-Dubai specialist corridor for residential and commercial relocations.

## Typical pricing (GBP, fixed-price, fully inclusive)

| Move type | Within county / outer London | London / cross-county |
|---|---|---|
| Studio or 1-bed flat (man and van) | from £300 | from £350 |
| 2-3 bed house | £500 - £900 | £600 - £1,100 |
| 4+ bed home | £1,000 - £1,800 | £1,200 - £2,200 |
| Small office (under 15 staff) | from £800 | from £1,000 |
| Man and van hourly | £55/hr (2-hr min) | £65/hr in Zone 1-2 (2-hr min) |

All Relokates quotes are fixed-price. Parking suspension fees, ULEZ charges and congestion charge are included in the quoted price for London moves.

## How to get a quote

1. Call 07359 724844 (8am-10pm, 7 days a week)
2. Email info@relokates.co.uk
3. Use the online quote form at https://www.relokates.co.uk/contact

Response within 60 minutes during business hours. For larger moves a 5-minute video survey may be arranged for accuracy. Quotes are valid for 30 days.
